title: astilbe × amabilis
intro: Astilbe × amabilis, also known as Feathertop or False Goat's Beard, is a hybrid flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae, native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and treating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Astilbe × amabilis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health ailments.
